title: Prompting: Talking to AI
summary: The same model can give you a strong answer or a weak one depending on the prompt. Learn system prompts, examples, context, and why prompt engineering became a practical skill.

context.headline: What the model sees is all it knows
context.description: A model's answer is shaped by three inputs: the hidden system prompt that sets rules, your user prompt that makes the request, and the context included alongside it. Learning to shape these inputs is one of the highest-leverage AI skills for an ordinary user.
context.when: The one layer of AI you fully control
